title: Income-tax return: Here's a checklist of required documents for smooth ITR filing process
summary: Filing your income tax returns (ITR) can be a tough task for first-time taxpayers and salaried individuals alike. Here's a checklist of essential documents you'll need to make the process smooth and hassle-free.

title: EPFO: Here's how to retrieve your forgotten UAN using the official portal and Umang app — Stepwise guide
summary: The Employees' Provident Fund offers a secure retirement savings option for Indian salaried individuals offering an 8.25% interest rate for FY26. Here's how EPF subscribers can retrieve their UAN via the EPFO portal or Umang app.

title: Only 4 value mutual funds delivered double-digit returns in one year. Here's why experts aren't worried
summary: Only four of the 23 value mutual funds delivered double-digit returns over the past year, while nine schemes posted losses. Experts explain why the numbers don't tell the full story and what investors should look for instead.

title: 8th pay commission: Discussions ongoing, check full list of beneficiaries for pay hikes, allowances, other benefits
summary: The 8th Pay Commission is in discussion to recommend pay hikes and salary structure for central government employees and pensioners. Chaired by Ranjana Prakash Desai, it aims to benefit around 1 crore individuals and will submit recommendations by November 2025.

title: DA, DR hike: Dearness allowance for pensioners — Dearness Relief calculation, eligibility explained
summary: Dearness Allowance: A fixed percentage of pensioners' monthly pension payments is aimed at mitigating inflation. However, unlike DA in salaries for central government employees, the component is known as Dearness Relief or DR.

title: Newly married couples: 8 health insurance mistakes to avoid
summary: Newly married couples should review health insurance plans, assess coverage needs and plan for maternity benefits. This guide highlights common mistakes, including relying only on employer cover and overlooking parents’ healthcare needs, to help couples make smarter financial decisions.

title: Retired PSU employee faces ₹2 lakh tax demand over Form 16 omission; ITAT Pune grants relief
summary: A retired PSU employee successfully challenged a ₹2 lakh tax demand after ITAT Pune ruled that a leave encashment exemption cannot be denied because it was omitted from Form 16. The Tribunal held that statutory tax benefits are determined by law and not by how the employer reports them.

title: ITR Filing 2026: CBDT upgrades income tax portal before July 31 deadline, Key changes explained
summary: The Finance Ministry has told Parliament that the Income Tax Department has strengthened the e-filing portal to handle peak traffic during the return filing season, with infrastructure capable of processing up to 1 crore ITRs a day.

title: Can cooperative insurance become India’s next financial inclusion story?
summary: The proposed national cooperative life insurer is about more than adding another player—it could shift India's insurance journey from expanding access to building financial resilience.

title: Can the government impose taxes without a law? What Article 265 says
summary: Article 265 of the Indian Constitution states that no tax can be levied or collected except by the authority of law. In simple terms, every tax must be backed by a valid law passed by Parliament or a state legislature, preventing arbitrary taxation by the government.

title: Cube Highways Trust collects Rs 1,687 crore from anchor investors ahead of IPO
summary: Cube Highways Trust secured Rs 1,687.5 crore from anchor investors before its public offering. The Infrastructure Investment Trust plans to raise Rs 5,000 crore through this upcoming public issue. Prazim Trading and Investment Co emerged as the largest anchor investor, committing Rs 300 crore. title: Mahindra Finance Q1 Results: Profit jumps 75% to Rs 927 crore on higher interest margin, lower provisions
summary: Mahindra and Mahindra Financial Services has experienced a remarkable seventy-five percent surge in net profit, driven by enhanced net interest margins and reduced provisions. The chief executive highlighted the positive impact of a recent rights issuance on the cost of funding. Disbursements soared

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Wednesday
summary: Indian markets extended losses as large-cap weakness outweighed gains in broader indices despite easing oil prices. Analysts expect earnings, geopolitical developments and crude prices to guide sentiment, with Nifty seen consolidating between 23,800 and 24,350 while midcaps continue to outperform.

title: Market Trading Guide: JK Cement among 2 stock recommendations for Wednesday
summary: Markets traded in a volatile range amid Middle East tensions, elevated crude prices and weak financial stocks. Analysts expect earnings, oil prices, FII flows and geopolitics to drive sentiment, while recommending JK Cement and Chennai Petroleum after strong technical breakouts with bullish momentum

title: IHCL Q1 Results: Profit rises 18% YoY to Rs 390 crore, total income up 15%
summary: Tata Group-backed IHCL reported its 17th consecutive record quarter, with Q1 FY27 net profit rising 18.5% and total income up 15%. Strong hotel performance, rapid expansion, acquisitions and growth businesses offset macro challenges, while the company maintained its double-digit revenue growth outlo

title: ICICI Bank eyes $500 million dollar bond issue via GIFT City
summary: ICICI Bank is close to raising at least $500 million through five-year dollar bonds via its GIFT City unit, leveraging the RBI’s concessional swap facility. The proceeds will support client financing, marking the lender’s first US dollar bond issuance in nearly a decade.

title: Anant Raj to demerge data centre arm into separately listed company
summary: Anant Raj will demerge its data centre and cloud business into Ashok Cloud Pvt Ltd, creating a separately listed digital infrastructure company. The move aims to unlock shareholder value, support expansion to 307 MW by FY32 and strengthen its cloud services platform.

title: Powerful rally! This Wall Street AI winner with 500% share price jump is not your typical chip stock
summary: GE Vernova has surged over 500% since its 2024 spin-off, emerging as a key AI infrastructure play. Investors are betting on rising electricity demand from data centres, boosting orders, backlog and guidance. Strong growth in power, electrification and gas turbines is driving the rally beyond traditi

title: Sebi asks depositories to put in place operational framework to implement buyback rules from Aug 1
summary: Market regulator Sebi has required tht depositories must implement a new promoter holding freeze mechanism by August 1. This framework will cover ISIN-level freezing and operational guidelines for companies.
